<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets the download URL of a key-value cache item"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/cache-items/{cache-item-id}/download"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets a download URL of a cache item.
